    By Lotus Path Wellness
    Life moves fast. Between work, family, and everything in between, even self-care can start to feel like one more thing on the to-do list. You want to slow down and reset—but the idea of driving across town, finding parking, and rushing back home afterward can be enough to make you... [Read More]

  • Reiki and Pain Management

    What research reveals about chronic pain, fibromyalgia, and post-surgical recovery

    By Lotus Path Wellness
    Pain is one of the most common reasons people seek complementary therapies. Whether it’s chronic pain that has persisted for years, the widespread discomfort of fibromyalgia, or the acute pain following surgery, finding relief becomes a central focus of daily life. [Read More]

  • The Science Behind Energy Healing

    Understanding biofield, meridians, and the human energy system

    By Lotus Path Wellness
    When people first encounter energy healing practices like Reiki, a common question arises: “Is there any science behind this?” It’s a fair question. While ancient healing traditions have understood energy flow for thousands of years, modern science is now beginning to explore and measure these phenomena in fascinating ways. [Read More]

    • reiki

  • New Research Shows Reiki Improves Quality of Life

    A 2025 meta-analysis of 661 participants demonstrates significant benefits

    By Lotus Path Wellness
    A brand new 2025 meta-analysis published in Systematic Reviews provides fresh scientific evidence that Reiki therapy significantly improves quality of life. This comprehensive study analyzed 11 randomized controlled trials involving 661 participants, offering robust support for Reiki as a complementary wellness practice. [Read More]
    Tags:
    • reiki
    • research
    • quality of life
    • science
    • evidence-based

  • Scientific Evidence for Reiki's Impact on Anxiety

    A 2024 meta-analysis reveals significant anxiety reduction across 824 participants

    By Lotus Path Wellness
    For those who wonder whether Reiki has scientific backing, a comprehensive 2024 meta-analysis published in BMC Palliative Care offers compelling evidence. This rigorous study examined 13 randomized controlled trials involving 824 adult participants, revealing that Reiki therapy significantly reduces anxiety. [Read More]
    Tags:
    • reiki
    • research
    • anxiety
    • science
    • evidence-based

  • What is Reiki?

    An ancient healing practice for modern wellness

    By Lotus Path Wellness
    Reiki is a Japanese energy healing technique that promotes relaxation, reduces stress, and supports the body’s natural ability to heal. The word “Reiki” comes from two Japanese words: Rei (universal) and Ki (life energy). [Read More]
    Tags:
    • reiki
    • healing
    • wellness
